meanings.sukuyo.mansion.ashvini: Ashvinī (婁宿) is swift and pioneering, a healing, energetic mansion that begins boldly and moves with quick initiative.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.bharani: Bharaṇī (胃宿) bears burdens with endurance and restraint, a mansion of transformation, discipline and hard-won growth.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.krittika: Kṛttikā (昴宿) is sharp and fiery, a cutting, purifying mansion of keen judgement and unflinching honesty.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.rohini: Rohiṇī (畢宿) is beautiful and fertile, a charming mansion of growth, attraction and material grace.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.mrigashira: Mṛgaśira (觜宿) is the gentle seeker, a curious, searching mansion that roves in pursuit of what it longs for.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.ardra: Ārdrā (参宿) is the storm, an intense mansion of upheaval, emotional depth and breakthrough after turbulence.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.punarvasu: Punarvasu (井宿) is renewal and return, an optimistic mansion of safe harbour, recovery and fresh starts.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.pushya: Puṣya (鬼宿) is nourishing and protective, a devoted, prosperous mansion regarded as deeply auspicious.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.ashlesha: Āśleṣā (柳宿) is the coiled serpent, an intuitive, cunning mansion of penetrating insight and entangling power.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.magha: Maghā (星宿) is the throne of the ancestors, a proud, dignified mansion of authority, legacy and honour.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.purva_phalguni: Pūrva Phalgunī (張宿) is the star of pleasure, a relaxed, romantic mansion of leisure, creativity and enjoyment.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.uttara_phalguni: Uttara Phalgunī (翼宿) is the generous patron, a reliable mansion of friendship, contracts and steady support.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.hasta: Hasta (軫宿) is the skilled hand, a deft, clever mansion of craft, dexterity and practical accomplishment.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.chitra: Chitrā (角宿) is the brilliant gem, a mansion of design, beauty and dazzling, well-wrought artistry.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.svati: Svātī (亢宿) is the wind, an independent, flexible mansion of movement, trade and self-directed freedom.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.vishakha: Viśākhā (氐宿) is goal-driven, a determined mansion of ambition, focus and purpose ripening toward its aim.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.anuradha: Anurādhā (房宿) is devoted friendship, a cooperative mansion of loyalty, success among others and fortune abroad.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.jyeshtha: Jyeṣṭhā (心宿) is the elder, a courageous mansion of seniority, protection and quietly held power.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.mula: Mūla (尾宿) is the root, an investigative mansion that uproots and probes to reach the very core of things.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.purva_ashadha: Pūrva Āṣāḍhā (箕宿) is the invincible, a persuasive mansion of early victory and unshakeable conviction.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.uttara_ashadha: Uttara Āṣāḍhā (斗宿) is lasting victory, an upright mansion of integrity, endurance and enduring leadership.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.shravana: Śravaṇa (女宿) is the listener, a learned mansion of attentiveness, connection and growing reputation.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.dhanishtha: Dhaniṣṭhā (虚宿) is the drum, a rhythmic mansion of wealth, music, fame and abundant vitality.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.shatabhisha: Śatabhiṣā (危宿) is the hundred healers, a secretive, mystical mansion of healing and hidden knowledge.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.purva_bhadrapada: Pūrva Bhādrapadā (室宿) is fervent and idealistic, an intense mansion of conviction and transformative fire.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.uttara_bhadrapada: Uttara Bhādrapadā (壁宿) is the deep water, a calm, wise mansion of depth, patience and steady counsel.
meanings.sukuyo.mansion.revati: Revatī (奎宿) is the nourisher, a gentle mansion of completion, safe passage and kindly prosperity.
